standard_variable.semantic_grain: one row per positive state episode

database_mapping.source_start_field: charttime or procedure starttime after approved intervalization
database_mapping.source_end_field: charttime plus modality-specific carry window or procedure endtime after approved intervalization
database_mapping.source_grain: one official RRT/CRRT point row or one dialysis procedure interval row before support-episode union
database_mapping.target_grain: one retained positive any-RRT support state episode row

identifier_normalization.subject_id_role: patient-level identifier from trusted stay map
identifier_normalization.hadm_id_role: hospital-admission-level identifier from trusted stay map
identifier_normalization.stay_id_role: ICU-stay-level identifier from official RRT/CRRT sources, ICU procedureevents, and trusted stay map

included_scope: typed official CRRT/IHD/peritoneal RRT active points
conservatively retained unresolved active dialysis evidence for umbrella any-RRT truth
adjacent_status_boundary.boundary_reason: This same-name variable represents any RRT support active, not exact modality truth, CRRT-only support, non-CRRT-only support, extracorporeal fluid-removal measurement, first-day summary, free-day outcome, AKI stage, or renal SOFA phenotype.

state_episode_build_translation.positive_state_translation: retain official MIMIC RRT active evidence, CRRT system-active context evidence, approved dialysis procedure intervals, and conservative unresolved active dialysis evidence for umbrella any-RRT support truth
state_episode_build_translation.episode_start_translation: use merged support_starttime after approved point-carry and procedure intervalization
state_episode_build_translation.episode_end_translation: use merged support_endtime after approved point-carry and procedure intervalization
state_episode_build_translation.continuity_translation: merge overlapping or exactly contiguous approved any-RRT source intervals within stay; any positive gap starts a new support episode
state_episode_build_translation.no_row_translation: absence of a retained row means no positive RRT episode under this source-evidence rule

validation_contract.positive_only_no_row_policy_check: false rows are not emitted; absence of row is not universal proof of no RRT, no AKI, or no renal support outside the approved source-evidence rule
notes: The retained source is a reviewed local RRT support-state foundation built from official MIMIC RRT/CRRT derived tables and dialysis procedure intervals.
Opening v1 is an any-RRT umbrella active-state asset.
Exact modality, CRRT-family, non-CRRT, first-day summary, fluid-removal, and free-day outputs remain separate variables.
Unresolved active dialysis evidence can contribute to umbrella any-RRT support truth but is not forced into an exact modality child table.

execution_contract.formal_output_rule: The governed execution.py entrypoint should read this mapping spec and delegate to the current local reviewed implementation until a more fully spec-native runner replaces it.
execution_contract.non_bypassable_target_rule: Formal std_rrt_active outputs for MIMIC-IV-3.1 should be produced only through the governed execution.py path rather than side SQL or ad hoc rebuilds.
